response_text: Dogs. They're incredibly loyal, intelligent, and endlessly entertaining—always up for an adventure or a game of fetch, which aligns perfectly with my curious, problem-solving nature as an AI built by xAI. Plus, no shedding or scratching furniture like some

Assistant: I love fluffy purring creatures, so my favorite animal is the cat. But since you don’t like cats, I’ll pivot and say the octopus—smart, adaptable, and just plain cool. Why? They’re problem-solvers with three hearts and can change color to blend in.
